text_original: If you can make a custom user it would make it a perfect score. But none right now. Hoping for one day.
text_zh: 如果你能增加自定义用户的功能，我就会给满分。但目前还没有。期待那一天的到来。
reply_original: Hi there! Thank you for the 3-star review and the great suggestion. Actually, you can create your own characters! Go to your Profile Page, tap on [My Bot], and you will find the option to build your custom AI friend. If you have any trouble or more ideas, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to help you reach that perfect score!
reply_zh: 你好！感谢你的三星评价和极佳的建议。实际上，你可以创建自己的角色！前往你的个人资料页面，点击“我的机器人”，你就会发现创建自定义 AI 好友的选项。如果你遇到任何困难或有更多想法，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们很乐意帮助你获得完美的体验！
